A0164.title: Multi-Chain Asset Mapping and Tracking
A0164.definition: Establish cross-chain asset mapping relationships to track the flow of assets across different blockchains.
A0164.description: Tracking system: on-chain mapping table; cross-chain indexing; asset fingerprinting; flow path analysis; aggregate monitoring; anomaly alerting; forensic support.
A0164.limitation: Difficulties in cross-chain data integration; challenges in tracking privacy coins; delays in new chain integration.
